reason: Frontend stack overview, required spec routing, and default quality command expectations.
New frontend lib/test files must follow repository placement and import conventions.

The task explicitly removes repeated parser/formatter and mutation patterns; search-before-helper rules apply.
Publish transaction and store/provider boundaries cross frontend hooks, Tauri commands, and persisted state.
